rationale.R1.2: Any general opinion on this excerpt would centrally involve checking internal logical consistency — e.g., whether the non-stationarity argument actually follows from the input-space alignment claim, and whether the router's design choices support the stated guarantees.
rationale.R1.3: The excerpt makes specific quantitative claims (63% compute reduction, 4% CRPS penalty, 8-year training window) with no attached tables or figures; assessing whether those claims are adequately grounded is central to any opinion.
